meaning: n.测量,调查,俯瞰,概观,纵览,视察vt.调查(收入,民意等) 测量,勘定,审视,视察,俯瞰,通盘考虑vi.测量土地
examples: This very thorough survey goes back to 1784.
I have an analytical approach to every survey.
The survey covers all aspects of the business.
In a survey carried out in 1987, 75% of the population identified themselves as middle class.
Republican political consultant William Greener says the survey responses indicate McCain can increase his rural margin.
